members.name: fit_proxy
members.brief: fits a proxy from a range of faces, in the L2 sense, with an integral (closed-form) formulation.
members.detailed: The best-fit plane passes through the center of mass and is defined by the two principal components of the integral covariance matrix. FaceRange range of face descriptors, model of Range. faces the range of faces to be fitted tm input triangle mesh fitted proxy

CGAL::Variational_shape_approximation.name: CGAL::Variational_shape_approximation
CGAL::Variational_shape_approximation.brief: Main class for Variational Shape Approximation algorithm.
CGAL::Variational_shape_approximation.detailed: It is based on [1] . For simple use cases, the function CGAL::Surface_mesh_approximation::approximate_mesh() might be sufficient. TriangleMesh a model of FaceListGraph VertexPointMap a ReadablePropertyMap with boost::graph_traits<TriangleMesh>::vertex_descriptor as key and GeomTraits::Point_3 as value type ErrorMetricProxy a model of ErrorMetricProxy GeomTraits a model of Kernel Concurrency_tag concurrency tag.

members.name: Geom_traits
members.brief: Geometric traits type.
members.definition: typedef GeomTraits CGAL::Variational_shape_approximation< TriangleMesh, VertexPointMap, ErrorMetricProxy, GeomTraits, Concurrency_tag >::Geom_traits

members.name: Error_metric
members.brief: Error metric for proxy fitting type.
members.definition: typedef ErrorMetricProxy CGAL::Variational_shape_approximation< TriangleMesh, VertexPointMap, ErrorMetricProxy, GeomTraits, Concurrency_tag >::Error_metric

members.name: Proxy
members.brief: Proxy type.
members.definition: typedef Error_metric::Proxy CGAL::Variational_shape_approximation< TriangleMesh, VertexPointMap, ErrorMetricProxy, GeomTraits, Concurrency_tag >::Proxy

members.name: Indexed_triangle
members.brief: Indexed triangle type.
members.definition: typedef std::array<std::size_t, 3> CGAL::Variational_shape_approximation< TriangleMesh, VertexPointMap, ErrorMetricProxy, GeomTraits, Concurrency_tag >::Indexed_triangle

members.name: Variational_shape_approximation
members.brief: initializes internal data for the approximation.
members.detailed: tm CGAL TriangleMesh on which approximation operates vpoint_map vertex point map of the mesh error_metric an ErrorMetricProxy object
members.definition: CGAL::Variational_shape_approximation< TriangleMesh, VertexPointMap, ErrorMetricProxy, GeomTraits, Concurrency_tag >::Variational_shape_approximation

members.name: initialize_seeds
members.brief: initializes the seeds with both maximum number of proxies and minimum error drop stop criteria.
members.detailed: The first criterion met stops the seeding. Parameters out of range are ignored. NamedParameters a sequence of bgl_namedparameters np an optional sequence of Named Parameters among the ones listed below number of proxies initialized Seeding Named Parameters <button class="collapsible"> seeding_method </button> the selection of seeding method Type: CGAL::Surface_mesh_approximation::Seeding_method Default: CGAL::Surface_mesh_approximation::HIERARCHICAL <button class="collapsible"> max_number_of_proxies </button> the maximum number of proxies used to approximate the input mesh Type: std::size_t Default: num_faces(tm) / 3 , used when min_error_drop is also not provided <button class="collapsible"> min_error_drop </button> the minimum error drop of the approximation, expressed as the ratio between two iterations of proxy addition Type: geom_traits::FT Default: 0.1 , used when max_number_of_proxies is also not provided <button class="collapsible"> number_of_relaxations </button> the number of relaxation iterations interleaved within seeding Type: std::size_t Default: 5
members.definition: std::size_t CGAL::Variational_shape_approximation< TriangleMesh, VertexPointMap, ErrorMetricProxy, GeomTraits, Concurrency_tag >::initialize_seeds

members.name: run
members.brief: runs the partitioning and fitting processes on the whole surface.
members.detailed: nb_iterations number of iterations. total fitting error
members.definition: FT CGAL::Variational_shape_approximation< TriangleMesh, VertexPointMap, ErrorMetricProxy, GeomTraits, Concurrency_tag >::run

members.name: run_to_convergence
members.brief: calls run while error decrease is greater than cvg_threshold .
members.detailed: cvg_threshold the percentage of error change between two successive runs, should be in range (0, 1) . max_iterations maximum number of iterations allowed avg_interval size of error average interval to have smoother convergence curve, if 0 is assigned, 1 is used instead. true if converged before hitting the maximum iterations.
members.definition: bool CGAL::Variational_shape_approximation< TriangleMesh, VertexPointMap, ErrorMetricProxy, GeomTraits, Concurrency_tag >::run_to_convergence
members.argsstring: (const FT cvg_threshold, const std::size_t max_iterations=100, std::size_t avg_interval=3)

members.name: compute_total_error
members.brief: computes fitting error of current partition to the proxies.
members.detailed: total fitting error
members.definition: FT CGAL::Variational_shape_approximation< TriangleMesh, VertexPointMap, ErrorMetricProxy, GeomTraits, Concurrency_tag >::compute_total_error

members.name: add_to_furthest_proxies
members.brief: adds proxies to the worst regions one by one.
members.detailed: The re-fitting is performed after each proxy is inserted. nb_proxies number of proxies to be added nb_iterations number of re-fitting iterations number of proxies added
members.definition: std::size_t CGAL::Variational_shape_approximation< TriangleMesh, VertexPointMap, ErrorMetricProxy, GeomTraits, Concurrency_tag >::add_to_furthest_proxies

members.name: add_proxies_error_diffusion
members.brief: adds proxies by diffusing fitting error into current partition.
members.detailed: Each partition is added with the number of proxies in proportion to its fitting error. nb_proxies number of proxies to be added number of proxies successfully added
members.definition: std::size_t CGAL::Variational_shape_approximation< TriangleMesh, VertexPointMap, ErrorMetricProxy, GeomTraits, Concurrency_tag >::add_proxies_error_diffusion

members.name: teleport_proxies
members.brief: teleports the local minimum to the worst region by combining the merging and adding processes.
members.detailed: The re-fitting is performed after each teleportation. Here if we specify more than one proxy this means we teleport in a naive iterative fashion. nb_proxies number of proxies requested to teleport. nb_iterations number of re-fitting iterations. no_threshold_test if true , no check on the approximation error before merging a pair of proxies is done. In other words, find_best_merge (!no_threshold_test) is called. number of proxies teleported.
members.definition: std::size_t CGAL::Variational_shape_approximation< TriangleMesh, VertexPointMap, ErrorMetricProxy, GeomTraits, Concurrency_tag >::teleport_proxies
members.argsstring: (const std::size_t nb_proxies, const std::size_t nb_iterations=5, const bool no_threshold_test=false)

members.name: merge
members.brief: merges two specified adjacent regions.
members.detailed: The overall re-fitting is not performed and the proxy index map is maintained. two proxies must be adjacent, and 0 <= px0 < px1 < proxies.size() px0 the kept proxy index px1 the merged and erased proxy index, proxies with greater indeies are decreased by 1 to fill the gap change of error
members.definition: FT CGAL::Variational_shape_approximation< TriangleMesh, VertexPointMap, ErrorMetricProxy, GeomTraits, Concurrency_tag >::merge

members.name: find_best_merge
members.brief: simulates merging and local re-fitting of all pairs of adjacent proxies and finds the best pair to merge.
members.detailed: The best is defined as the minimum merged sum error change (increase or decrease) among all pairs. use_threshold_test if true and a best pair of proxies is found, it is returned only if the error change after the merge is lower than the half of the maximum proxy error. if the best merge pair is found the optional returned contains the proxy indices, and is empty otherwise.
members.definition: std::optional< std::pair< std::size_t, std::size_t > > CGAL::Variational_shape_approximation< TriangleMesh, VertexPointMap, ErrorMetricProxy, GeomTraits, Concurrency_tag >::find_best_merge

members.name: split
members.brief: splits within a specified proxy area via N-section (by default bisection), other regions are not affected.
members.detailed: px_idx proxy index. n number of split sections. nb_relaxations number of relaxations within the proxy area px_idx after the split true if split succeeds, and false otherwise.
members.definition: bool CGAL::Variational_shape_approximation< TriangleMesh, VertexPointMap, ErrorMetricProxy, GeomTraits, Concurrency_tag >::split
members.argsstring: (const std::size_t px_idx, const std::size_t n=2, const std::size_t nb_relaxations=10)

members.name: extract_mesh
members.brief: extracts the output mesh in the form of an indexed triangle set.
members.detailed: NamedParameters a sequence of bgl_namedparameters np an optional sequence of Named Parameters among the ones listed below true if the extracted surface mesh is manifold, and false otherwise. Meshing Named Parameters <button class="collapsible"> subdivision_ratio </button> the chord subdivision ratio threshold to the chord length or average edge length Type: geom_traits::FT Default: 5.0 <button class="collapsible"> boundary_subdivision_ratio </button> the chord subdivision ratio threshold to the chord length or average edge length for boundary edges Type: geom_traits::FT Default: subdivision_ratio <button class="collapsible"> relative_to_chord </button> If true , the subdivision_ratio is the ratio of the furthest vertex distance to the chord length, otherwise is the average edge length Type: Boolean Default: false <button class="collapsible"> with_dihedral_angle </button> If true , the subdivision_ratio is weighted by dihedral angle Type: Boolean Default: false <button class="collapsible"> optimize_anchor_location </button> If true , optimize the anchor locations Type: Boolean Default: true <button class="collapsible"> optimize_boundary_anchor_location </button> If true , optimize the anchor locations of boundary vertices Type: Boolean Default: optimize_anchor_location <button class="collapsible"> pca_plane </button> If true , use PCA plane fitting, otherwise use the default area averaged plane parameters Type: Boolean Default: false
members.definition: bool CGAL::Variational_shape_approximation< TriangleMesh, VertexPointMap, ErrorMetricProxy, GeomTraits, Concurrency_tag >::extract_mesh

members.name: output
members.brief: outputs approximation results.
members.detailed: NamedParameters a sequence of bgl_namedparameters np an optional sequence of Named Parameters among the ones listed below Output Named Parameters <button class="collapsible"> face_proxy_map </button> a property map to output the proxy index of each face of the input polygon mesh Type: a model of WritablePropertyMap with boost::graph_traits<TriangleMesh>::face_descriptor as key and std::size_t as value type Default: no output operation is performed Extra: A proxy is a set of connected faces which are placed under the same proxy patch (see fig__iterations ) Extra: The proxy-ids are contiguous in range [0, number_of_proxies - 1] <button class="collapsible"> proxies </button> an OutputIterator to put proxies in Type: a class model of OutputIterator with CGAL::Surface_mesh_approximation::L21_metric_vector_proxy_no_area_weighting::Proxy value type Default: no output operation is performed <button class="collapsible"> anchors </button> an OutputIterator to put anchor points in Type: a class model of OutputIterator with geom_traits::Point_3 value type Default: no output operation is performed <button class="collapsible"> triangles </button> an OutputIterator to put indexed triangles in Type: a class model of OutputIterator with std::array<std::size_t, 3> value type Default: no output operation is performed
members.definition: void CGAL::Variational_shape_approximation< TriangleMesh, VertexPointMap, ErrorMetricProxy, GeomTraits, Concurrency_tag >::output

members.brief: returns the number of proxies.
members.definition: std::size_t CGAL::Variational_shape_approximation< TriangleMesh, VertexPointMap, ErrorMetricProxy, GeomTraits, Concurrency_tag >::number_of_proxies

members.name: init_random
members.brief: randomly initializes proxies with both maximum number of proxies and minimum error drop stop criteria, where the first criterion met stops the seeding.
members.detailed: To ensure the randomness, call std::srand() beforehand. max_nb_proxies maximum number of proxies, should be in range (nb_connected_components, nb_faces / 3) min_error_drop minimum error drop, should be in range (0.0, 1.0) , negative value is ignored nb_relaxations number of re-fitting iterations number of proxies initialized

members.name: init_incremental

members.detailed: max_nb_proxies maximum number of proxies, should be in range (nb_connected_components, nb_faces / 3) min_error_drop minimum error drop, should be in range (0.0, 1.0) , negative value is ignored nb_relaxations number of re-fitting iterations number of proxies initialized

members.brief: partitions the area tagged with CGAL_VSA_INVALID_TAG with proxies, global face proxy map is updated.

members.name: bootstrap_from_connected_components
members.brief: initializes proxies from each connected component of the input mesh.

PkgTSMARef.name: PkgTSMARef
PkgTSMARef.detailed: Pierre Alliez, David Cohen-Steiner, and Lingjie Zhu This package implements the Variational Shape Approximation method to approximate an input surface triangle mesh by a simpler surface triangle mesh. The algorithm proceeds by iterative clustering of triangles, the clustering process being seeded randomly, incrementally or hierarchically. While the default function runs an automated version of the algorithm, interactive control is possible via a class interface. The API is flexible and can be extended to user-defined proxies and error metrics. Introduced in: CGAL 4.14 BibTeX: cgal:az-tsma-26a Depends on: thirdpartyEigen License: GPL Windows Demo: CGAL Lab Classified Reference Pages Parameters Optional parameters of the functions of this package are implemented as BGL named parameters. The page bgl_namedparameters describes their usage. Concepts ErrorMetricProxy Main Functions CGAL::Surface_mesh_approximation::approximate_triangle_mesh() Classes CGAL::Surface_mesh_approximation::L21_metric_plane_proxy CGAL::Surface_mesh_approximation::L2_metric_plane_proxy CGAL::Variational_shape_approximation Todo add option to enforce guarantee of 2-manifold and oriented output mesh add option to smooth frontiers of the partition add option to smooth and mutual tessellate frontiers of the partition add function in the class interface to optimize, after meshing, the anchor point locations to minimize a user-defined metric (two-sided L1, two-sided L2, Wasserstein distance, etc). add simulated annealing and combined operations to reach better minima.

members.name: Verbose_level
members.brief: Verbose level enumeration.

members.name: Seeding_method
members.brief: Seeding method enumeration for Variational Shape Approximation algorithm.

members.name: approximate_triangle_mesh
members.brief: approximates the input mesh with plane proxies.
members.detailed: This function uses the Variational Shape Approximation algorithm described in [1] to approximate a triangle surface mesh, with indexed triangles as output. TriangleMesh model of FaceListGraph NamedParameters a sequence of bgl_namedparameters tm triangle surface mesh to be approximated np an optional sequence of Named Parameters among the ones listed below true if the indexed triangles represent a 2-manifold, oriented surface mesh, and false otherwise. Approximation Named Parameters <button class="collapsible"> geom_traits </button> an instance of a geometric traits class Type: a model of Kernel Default: a CGAL Kernel deduced from the point type, using CGAL::Kernel_traits Extra: Exact constructions kernels are not supported by this function. <button class="collapsible"> vertex_point_map </button> a property map associating points to the vertices of tm Type: a class model of ReadablePropertyMap with boost::graph_traits<TriangleMesh>::vertex_descriptor as key type and Point_3 as value type Default: boost::get(CGAL::vertex_point, tm) Extra: If this parameter is omitted, an internal property map for CGAL::vertex_point_t must be available in TriangleMesh . <button class="collapsible"> verbose_level </button> the verbose level Type: CGAL::Surface_mesh_approximation::Verbose_level Default: CGAL::Surface_mesh_approximation::SILENT <button class="collapsible"> seeding_method </button> the selection of seeding method Type: CGAL::Surface_mesh_approximation::Seeding_method Default: CGAL::Surface_mesh_approximation::HIERARCHICAL <button class="collapsible"> max_number_of_proxies </button> the maximum number of proxies used to approximate the input mesh Type: std::size_t Default: num_faces(tm) / 3 , used when min_error_drop is also not provided <button class="collapsible"> min_error_drop </button> the minimum error drop of the approximation, expressed as the ratio between two iterations of proxy addition Type: geom_traits::FT Default: 0.1 , used when max_number_of_proxies is also not provided <button class="collapsible"> number_of_relaxations </button> the number of relaxation iterations interleaved within seeding Type: std::size_t Default: 5 <button class="collapsible"> number_of_iterations </button> the number of partitioning and fitting iterations after seeding Type: std::size_t Default: std::min(std::max(number_of_faces / max_number_of_proxies, 20), 60) Meshing Named Parameters <button class="collapsible"> subdivision_ratio </button> the chord subdivision ratio threshold to the chord length or average edge length Type: geom_traits::FT Default: 5.0 <button class="collapsible"> relative_to_chord </button> If true , the subdivision_ratio is the ratio of the furthest vertex distance to the chord length, otherwise is the average edge length Type: Boolean Default: false <button class="collapsible"> with_dihedral_angle </button> If true , the subdivision_ratio is weighted by dihedral angle Type: Boolean Default: false <button class="collapsible"> optimize_anchor_location </button> If true , optimize the anchor locations Type: Boolean Default: true <button class="collapsible"> pca_plane </button> If true , use PCA plane fitting, otherwise use the default area averaged plane parameters Type: Boolean Default: false Output Named Parameters <button class="collapsible"> face_proxy_map </button> a property map to output the proxy index of each face of the input polygon mesh Type: a model of WritablePropertyMap with boost::graph_traits<TriangleMesh>::face_descriptor as key and std::size_t as value type Default: no output operation is performed Extra: A proxy is a set of connected faces which are placed under the same proxy patch (see fig__iterations ) Extra: The proxy-ids are contiguous in range [0, number_of_proxies - 1] <button class="collapsible"> proxies </button> an OutputIterator to put proxies in Type: a class model of OutputIterator with CGAL::Surface_mesh_approximation::L21_metric_vector_proxy_no_area_weighting::Proxy value type Default: no output operation is performed <button class="collapsible"> anchors </button> an OutputIterator to put anchor points in Type: a class model of OutputIterator with geom_traits::Point_3 value type Default: no output operation is performed <button class="collapsible"> triangles </button> an OutputIterator to put indexed triangles in Type: a class model of OutputIterator with std::array<std::size_t, 3> value type Default: no output operation is performed
members.definition: bool CGAL::Surface_mesh_approximation::approximate_triangle_mesh
